name: NHN Cloud
description: NHN Cloud provides compute, DB, AI, game and messaging APIs tailored for Korean and Japanese enterprises.

when_to_use: Korean and Japanese enterprise cloud with messaging APIs
Game infrastructure and analytics tailored for Korean studios
AI and OCR APIs for Korean-market enterprise applications

review.verdict: Solid regional cloud for Korean and Japanese products, especially for gaming and messaging stacks.
review.best_for: Korean and Japanese game or messaging apps needing local cloud with specialized APIs
review.not_for: Global products, non-Asian teams, or cutting-edge serverless and AI needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
